title: Person
description: A Person is an individual who currently fills a Position. Person is the business-layer org roster — documentation-grade DNA used by SOP renderers, workflow-cell assignment, and UI directory pickers. It is NOT an authentication user: JWT subjects and session identity remain owned by the IDP. Edits to persons[] should not trigger downstream regeneration in api-cell or ui-cell.

name.description: The kebab-case stable identifier for this person (used as a reference key).

position.description: The Position (PascalCase) this person fills. Must reference a declared Position. A person has exactly one Position — use two Person records with the same email for dual-hat arrangements.

email.description: Email address. May serve as a convention join-key with the IDP, but is not a schema-enforced identity.

domain.description: The dot-separated domain path this person belongs to.

active.description: Whether this person currently fills the position. Defaults to true.
